title: The Unsaved in Bible Prophecy
summary: “And Cush begat Nimrod: he began to be a mighty one in the earth. He was a mighty hunter before the LORD: wherefore it is said, Even as Nimrod the mighty hunter before the LORD. Gen 10:10 And the beginning of his kingdom was Babel, and Erech, and Accad, and Calneh, in the land of Shinar.”(Gen 10:8-10). We have looked at Bible end time prophecy in relation to Israel and the church. This Bible study will consider the events prophesied concerning the world alone. By the world, I mean those who rebel against the Gospel of Jesus Christ, the unsaved. They too have a covenant with God – sadly a terrible one. Our hope and prayer is that unsaved individuals will read this message and make peace with the Creator and Savior of their souls, the Lord Jesus Christ.
